title: Savory Grape Leaf Casserole
description: A twist on a classic German dish, this grape leaf casserole is a hearty, comforting option for a chilly evening.
instructions: In a medium bowl, mix together the garlicky spread, casserole mix, and eastern spices.
Lay a grape leaf flat and place a spoonful of the mix in the center of the leaf.
Fold the stem end over the mix, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a neat package.
Repeat with the remaining grape leaves and mix.
In a large baking dish, create a layer of grape leaves.
Top with a layer of creamy sauce.
Repeat the layers, ending with a layer of creamy sauce on top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
